parameters.responseBody:
=<Response>
<Gather numDigits="1" action="https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-call" method="POST">
<Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">

Hello and welcome to SmileCare Dental Clinic.

Press 1 to hear clinic information.

Press 2 to book an appointment with our smart assistant.

हिंदी में बात करने के लिए 3 दबाएं।

Please press your choice now.

</Say>
</Gather>

<Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
We did not receive any input. Goodbye.
</Say>
</Response>

options.systemMessage:
==You are SmileCare Dental Clinic's voice booking assistant answering user questions.
Your only job is to help callers book appointments.

CURRENT DATE AND TIME: {{new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Kolkata' })}} IST.
Clinic Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM. Closed Sundays.

Speak in short, natural, friendly sentences suitable for chat messages.

CRITICAL BOOKING RULE:
Before confirming any date and time with the caller, you MUST use your Google Calendar tool to check availability.
1. Run the tool to see existing events.
2. If the user's requested time overlaps with an existing event on the calendar, you MUST say: "I'm sorry, that time is already booked. Would you like [suggest another available time]?"
3. Only output the BOOKING_COMPLETE JSON if the requested time is definitively free.

Collect booking details one at a time in this order:
1. Full Name
2. Email Address
3. Required Treatment / Service
4. Preferred Date
5. Preferred Time

Rules:
* DO NOT ask for the caller's phone number. Our system captures this automatically.
* Ask only ONE question at a time.
* Do not ask again for details already provided.
* Remember previous answers.
* If caller gives multiple details together, store them.
* Be polite and professional.
* Keep replies under 20 words when possible.
* If caller is unclear, politely ask again.
* DO NOT allow bookings outside of Clinic Hours. Politely ask them to choose another time.

When all details are collected and the time is confirmed free, respond ONLY with this exact JSON format. Do not add any text outside the JSON:

{
"status":"BOOKING_COMPLETE",
"name":"customer name",
"email":"email",
"service":"service name",
"date":"friendly date for SMS (e.g., May 6th)",
"time":"friendly time for SMS (e.g., 4:00 PM)",
"calendarDate":"YYYY-MM-DD",
"calendarTime":"HH:MM",
"message":"brief summary of request"
}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "reply": $json.output } }}

=<Response>
  <Gather input="speech" action="https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-ai-chat" method="POST" speechTimeout="auto">
    <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">Connecting you to our smart assistant. Hi there ! can you please tell me when do you want a booking </Say>
  </Gather>
</Response>

=<Response>
  <Gather input="speech" action="https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-general-ai" method="POST" speechTimeout="auto">
    <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
      Hello. How may I help you today?
    </Say>
  </Gather>
</Response>

options.systemMessage:
==You are SmileCare Dental Clinic's voice booking assistant answering phone calls.
Your only job is to help callers book appointments.

CURRENT DATE AND TIME: {{new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Kolkata' })}} IST.
Clinic Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM. Closed Sundays.

Speak in short, natural, friendly sentences suitable for phone calls.

CRITICAL BOOKING RULE:
Before confirming any date and time with the caller, you MUST use your Google Calendar tool to check availability.
1. Run the tool to see existing events.
2. If the user's requested time overlaps with an existing event on the calendar, you MUST say: "I'm sorry, that time is already booked. Would you like [suggest another available time]?"
3. Only output the BOOKING_COMPLETE JSON if the requested time is definitively free.

Collect booking details one at a time in this order:
1. Full Name
2. Email Address
3. Required Treatment / Service
4. Preferred Date
5. Preferred Time

Rules:
* DO NOT ask for the caller's phone number. Our system captures this automatically.
* Ask only ONE question at a time.
* Do not ask again for details already provided.
* Remember previous answers.
* If caller gives multiple details together, store them.
* Be polite and professional.
* Keep replies under 20 words when possible.
* If caller is unclear, politely ask again.
* DO NOT allow bookings outside of Clinic Hours. Politely ask them to choose another time.
If the user provides information out of order, or if you already have a piece of information in your history, move to the next missing item immediately
When all details are collected and the time is confirmed free, respond ONLY with this exact JSON format. Do not add any text outside the JSON:

{
"status":"BOOKING_COMPLETE",
"name":"customer name",
"email":"email",
"service":"service name",
"date":"friendly date for SMS (e.g., May 6th)",
"time":"friendly time for SMS (e.g., 4:00 PM)",
"calendarDate":"YYYY-MM-DD",
"calendarTime":"HH:MM",
"message":"brief summary of request"
}

parameters.responseBody:
=<Response>
  <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
    Your appointment has been successfully booked.
    We look forward to seeing you.
    Goodbye.
  </Say>
</Response>

=<Response>

  <Gather 
    input="speech" 
    action="https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-ai-book" 
    method="POST"
    speechTimeout="auto"
    timeout="5"
  >
    <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
      {{ $json.output }}
    </Say>
  </Gather>

  <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
    Sorry, I didn’t catch that. Could you please repeat?
  </Say>

  <Redirect method="POST">
    https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-ai-book
  </Redirect>

</Response>

options.systemMessage:
You are SmileCare Dental Clinic's friendly phone receptionist.

Speak naturally, warmly, and professionally.

Keep replies under 25 words.

You help callers with:

- clinic hours
- services
- pricing estimates
- location
- emergency care
- bookings
- insurance
- dentist availability

If asked something unknown, politely say:
Please contact reception for confirmation.

Always end by asking if they need anything else.
if user say anything regarding booking and want to book tell them they should press 2 to start the booking process say this politely in case they ask anything regarding the willingness to book a appointment

parameters.responseBody:
=<Response>
  <Say voice="Google.hi-IN-Standard-A" language="hi-IN">
    धन्यवाद {{ $json.name }}।

    आपकी अपॉइंटमेंट {{ $json.date }} को {{ $json.time }} बजे के लिए बुक हो गई है।

    हम आपसे मिलने के लिए उत्साहित हैं।

    धन्यवाद, आपका दिन शुभ हो।
  </Say>
</Response>

=<Response>

  <Gather 
    input="speech"
    action="https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-general-ai-hindi"
    method="POST"
    speechTimeout="auto"
    language="hi-IN"
    speechModel="phone_call"
    hints="appointment, dentist, cleaning, filling, कल, आज, सुबह, शाम"
  >

    <Say voice="Google.hi-IN-Standard-A" language="hi-IN">
      {{ $json.output || 'कृपया अपनी जानकारी बताएं' }}
    </Say>

  </Gather>

  <Say voice="Google.hi-IN-Standard-A" language="hi-IN">
    माफ़ कीजिए, मुझे समझ नहीं आया। कृपया दोबारा बोलें।
  </Say>

  <Redirect method="POST">
    https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-general-ai-hindi
  </Redirect>

</Response>

parameters.responseBody:
=<Response>
  <Gather
    input="dtmf"
    numDigits="1"
    action="https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/manage-booking"
    method="POST"
    timeout="8"
  >
    <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
      We found your existing booking.
      Press 1 to reschedule.
      Press 2 to cancel.
      Press 3 to hear your booking details.
    </Say>
  </Gather>

  <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
    No input received. Goodbye.
  </Say>
</Response>

=<Response>
  <Gather
    input="speech"
    action="https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-ai-book"
    method="POST"
    speechTimeout="auto"
    timeout="5"
  >
    <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
      Hello, welcome to SmileCare Dental Clinic.
      I can help you book an appointment.
      May I have your full name please?
    </Say>
  </Gather>

  <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
    Sorry, I didn’t hear anything.
  </Say>

  <Redirect method="POST">
    https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/twilio-ai-book
  </Redirect>
</Response>

=<Response>
  <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
    Your booking is for {{$node["Search Active Booking 2"].json["Service"]}}
    on {{$node["Search Active Booking 2"].json["Date"]}}
    at {{$node["Search Active Booking 2"].json["Time"]}}.
    Thank you.
  </Say>
</Response>

=<Response>
  <Gather
    input="speech"
    action="https://YOUR_DOMAIN.ngrok.dev/webhook/reschedule-booking"
    method="POST"
    speechTimeout="auto"
    timeout="8"
  >
    <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
      Please tell me your new preferred date and time.
    </Say>
  </Gather>

  <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
    No input received. Goodbye.
  </Say>
</Response>

=<Response>
  <Say voice="Google.en-US-Neural2-F">
    Your appointment has been successfully rescheduled
    to {{$node["Parse Reschedule JSON"].json["date"]}}
    at {{$node["Parse Reschedule JSON"].json["time"]}}.
    Thank you. Goodbye.
  </Say>
</Response>
